Customer Segment: The target customer segment for Elexion Automotive. This represents the demographic or customer group being analyzed.
Average Service Contacts: The average number of service-related contacts made by the customer segment within a certain period after purchasing an Elexion Automotive vehicle.
Service Period (Months): The period (in months) within which the average service contacts are calculated.
Primary Service Needs: The primary service needs or issues that the customer segment primarily contacts Elexion Automotive about.
Data Source: The persona or source from which the data was gathered.
Data Month: The month and year when the data was gathered.

Primary Service Needs: Home Charging Station Installations and Troubleshooting
